response: Alex handles 20 tickets daily with 8 being file access issues and 7 being data security concerns. The remaining 5 tickets are miscellaneous problems that Alex resolves partially. Since Alex fixes all 15 priority tickets and half of the 5 miscellaneous ones, the total resolved count is 17. This workflow is as smooth as a highway. The holiday season often brings more such queries. Another holiday might see similar patterns in support volume.
